name: redline
description: Automatic code review, adversarial review, and rescue between Claude Code and Codex.

openrouter_api_key.title: OpenRouter API key
openrouter_api_key.description: OpenRouter API key (or set OPENROUTER_API_KEY env var)

effort.title: Reasoning effort
effort.description: Reasoning effort: minimal, low, medium, high (default: medium)

provider.title: Provider
provider.description: openai (use existing Codex auth) or openrouter (route through OpenRouter for model choice)

claude_openrouter_api_key.title: Claude reviewer OpenRouter API key
claude_openrouter_api_key.description: OpenRouter API key for Codex users invoking Claude reviews (or set OPENROUTER_API_KEY)

claude_model.title: Claude reviewer model
claude_model.description: Claude reviewer model (subscription default: opus; OpenRouter default: anthropic/claude-opus-4.7)

claude_provider.title: Claude reviewer provider
claude_provider.description: subscription (use Claude Code auth) or openrouter (route Claude Code through OpenRouter)
